mapper.insert: insert into movmov_user_addresses ( addr_id , addr_name , addr_road , addr_detail , user_id , receiver_number , receiver_name ) values (#{id}, #{addr_name}, #{road}, #{detail}, #{user.id}, #{receiver_phone}, #{receiver_name})
mapper.select:
select ua.addr_id as id , ua.addr_name as addr_name , ua.addr_road as road , ua.addr_detail as detail , ua.user_id as "user.id" , ua.receiver_number as receiver_phone , ua.receiver_name as receiver_name
from movmov_users u
join movmov_user_addresses ua on u.addr_id = ua.addr_id and u.user_id = ua.user_id
where u.user_id = #{user.id}
